stemHtml: Mixed or cloudy ice is a type of ice that…

options.a: is the least commonly encountered of all ice types.
options.b: arises in conditions ranging between those that lead to mostly rime or mostly clear ice forming.
options.c: is formed when small hail stones accumulate on a warm surface.
options.d: is formed when a former ice-covered surface heats up and the ice starts to melt.
